questions.question: Starting from the blue ball hopper with the solved board configuration, describe the complete path of the first blue ball.
questions.answer: The blue ball drops from (2,-1), rolls onto ramp_right at (3,1), ramp_right at (4,2), ramp_left at (5,3), then solution: ramp_left at (4,3), ramp_left at (5,4), ramp_left at (6,5), ramp_right at (7,6), ramp_right at (8,7), ramp_right at (9,8), ramp_left at (8,9), ramp_left at (7,10), reaching the right lever.

questions.question: Which lever does the first blue ball trigger and what color ball is released next?
questions.answer: The first blue ball triggers the right lever, releasing a red ball.

questions.question: How many balls total are released and in what order?
questions.answer: One blue ball is released first, followed by 8 red balls.
